scene: A doodle stick figure head in profile with a visible brain, only a tiny ten-percent wedge of it glowing while the rest sits dark, a hopeful thought bubble with a graduation cap above. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A brain scan on a screen with the WHOLE brain lit up in bright rainbow colors, a doctor doodle figure pointing at it. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure lying back relaxing with eyes closed, while its brain still glows brightly and buzzes with little energy sparks. Flat dusty blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A brain with different regions glowing in different colors, each connected by a little arrow to a simple icon: a walking leg, a speech bubble, an eye. Flat soft purple background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

An open treasure chest labeled with nothing but a big red cross over it, empty inside, representing the imaginary unused ninety percent of the brain. Flat warm orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A small brain sitting on one side of a balance scale, vastly outweighing a huge pile of food and a glowing energy bolt on the other side. Flat green background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A happy doodle stick figure giving a thumbs up while its entire brain glows fully and brightly. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
